---
title: "Evaluation of<sup>198</sup> Au Nanoparticles Coated with Gum Arabic for Prostate Cancer: A Contextual Comparison with BSA-Coated"
date: 2025-07-22
author:
  - name: Barbezan, Angélica Bueno
  - name: Rosero, Wilmmer Alexander Arcos
  - name: Vieira, Daniel Perez
  - name: Rigo, Maria Eduarda Zaganin
  - name: Silva, Giovana Dias Da
  - name: Rodrigues, Alex Alves
  - name: Almeida, Luís Fernando De
  - name: Da Silva, Fabio Fernando Alves
  - name: González Rivera, Andy
  - name: Silva, Natanael Gomes Da
  - name: Soares Bernardes, Emerson
  - name: Rostelato, Maria Elisa C. M.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "ACS Omega"
  volume: 10
  issue: 28
  doi: "10.1021/acsomega.5c01385"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Evaluation of<sup>198</sup> Au Nanoparticles Coated with Gum Arabic for Prostate Cancer: A Contextual Comparison with BSA-Coated</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
